The '''EM field generator''' was a turret found on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Mobile Defense Unit]]s. It prevented enemy missiles from hitting their target using a type of [[Force field/Legends|force field]]. The letters EM stood for '''E'''lectro'''M'''agnetic.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
